title: Suspension of Drone Activities and Related Approvals
summary: Temporarily overrides the normal drone permit process by suspending all drone activities and related approvals in Bahrain until further notice.

theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.autonomous_smart_system: Suspends drone activities and related approvals until further notice.

notes: Instrument type recorded as uncertain in the source (decision?). Related instruments: Civil Aviation Affairs Drone Regulatory Framework and Permit Process
